 ''Not to be confused with <u>[[Mood]]</u>, which is a value that describes the player's mental state.''
'''Moodles''' are statuses that describe the player's condition as they descend through the caves. Various actions and events will make different moodles appear.

Several simply tell you of a need that the player character has, but others have more impact, ranging from being soaked in water, bleeding from a wound, and many other such events.

Moodles that are positive or whose effects don't stem from a negative event (other than Adrenaline from severe injuries, and Last Stand) will be outlined in a ''rectangular'' frame instead of ''circular''.

All moodles here are sorted in the way they appear to the player. Moodles near the bottom are considered side moodles, which only appear in the [[health panel]] or when the moodle bar is hovered over.

== Positive ==
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible"
|+
! scope="col" style="width: 10%" | Moodle
! scope="col" style="width: 50%" | Description
! scope="col" style="width: 5%" | [[Unchipped mode|Unchipped]]<abbr title="If the moodle is visible without a brainchip">[[file:mouse over me!.png|12px]]</abbr>
! scope="col" | Cause
|-
![[File:Moodlast.png|48x48px]]<br /> Last stand
|You're not going down that easily. Something deep inside you compels you to push through.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Last stand]] activated
|-
![[File:Stimulated.png|48x48px]]<br /> Stimulated
|Hard stimulant drugs in the bloodstream. You feel ready to tackle anything thrown at you...For now, at least.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Duration of any Stimulant > 0s
|-
! [[File:Asleep Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Sleeping
|Just taking a nap.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|<abbr title="Consciousness &lt; 20%">Unconscious</abbr> while [[Energy#Sleep|sleeping]]
|-
![[File:Moodle_hunger_4.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Satiated
|Eating good today! Lowered weight loss rate and mobility. Slight happiness increase.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Hunger]] > 100%
|-
![[File:Moodle_hunger_5.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Full
|Stomach totally stuffed with food! Any more and you'll be sick. Greatly lowered weight loss rate and mobility. Happiness increase.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Hunger > 120%
|-
![[File:Happy 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Satisfied
|Content with your current predicament.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Mood]] > 10%
|-
![[File:Happy 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Excited
|Looking forward to what's around the corner.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Mood > 30%
|-
![[File:Happy 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Happy
|You've found peace in this strange land.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Mood > 50%
|-
![[File:Happy 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Gleeful
|You're at the top of the world, shaping the way forward at your will. Nothing can stop you!
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Mood > 75%
|-
! colspan="4" style="text-align: center" | The following are <abbr title="Only appear in the health panel or while the moodle bar is hovered over">side moodles</abbr>
|-
![[File:HighImmunity Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Immunocompetent
|Your immune system is working at high capacity, likely due to antibiotics. Infections are much less dangerous, and might even regress on their own if near 200%.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Immunity]] > 150%
|-
![[File:BoostedRegrowth Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Boosted regrowth
|Your claws regrow three times as fast. (&lt;Time remaining&gt;)
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Using [[Keratin booster]]
|-
! [[File:Energized.png|48x48px]]<br /> Energized
|Stamina loss and sleepiness decreased. (&lt;Time remaining&gt;)
| style="text-align: center"| [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Energized|Caffeinated]]
|-
![[File:FightOrFlight Moodle.gif|48x48px]]<br /> Adrenaline
|Pain numbed. You're on high alert.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Adrenaline]] > 20%
Adrenaline > 65%
|}

== Negative ==

{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible"
|+
! scope="col" style="width: 10%" | Moodle
! scope="col" style="width: 50%" | Description
! scope="col" style="width: 5%" | [[Unchipped mode|Unchipped]]<abbr title="If the moodle is visible without a brainchip">[[file:mouse over me!.png|12px]]</abbr>
! scope="col" | Cause
|-
![[File:ImpendingDoom Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Sense of impending doom
| You can't help but feel sudden, overwhelming fear. Your skin has goosebumps all over. It's as if the nature around you abruptly fell silent...
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
| An [[Elder thornback]] is within 101.25 tiles of distance (but further than 45)
|-
![[File:HorrifiedMoodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">HORRIFIED</span>
|CAN'T FOCUS. CAN'T THINK. NOTHING ELSE MATTERS. RUN FOR YOUR LIFE OR FIGHT FOR IT!
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|An [[Elder thornback]] is within 45 tiles of distance and is in stage 1 (>=3750 health)
|-
![[File:Moodle_focused_8_critical.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">FOCUSED</span>
| ''Both of us die today. One, just a little later than the other.''
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
| An [[Elder thornback]] is within 45 tiles of distance and is not in stage 1 (<3750 health)
|-

![[File:Moodle_tachycardia_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Tachycardia
|Your heart rate feels abnormally high.
| style="text-align: center" | <abbr title="Only appears when unchipped">[[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
(Exclusive)</abbr>
|Heart rate > 110

Heart rate > 160

Heart rate > 200
|-
![[File:Bradycardia Moodle Animated.gif|48x48px]]<br /> Bradycardia
|Your heart rate feels abnormally low.
| style="text-align: center" | <abbr title="Only appears when unchipped">[[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]

(Exclusive)</abbr>
|Heart rate < 60
Heart rate < 40
|-
![[File:Palpitations.png|48x48px]]<br /> Palpitations
|You feel your heart pounding out of your chest. Are you just anxious, or is something horribly wrong?
| style="text-align: center" | <abbr title="Only appears when unchipped">[[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
(Exclusive)</abbr>
|Fibrillation > 50% or Heart rate > 240
|-
![[File:Braindamage Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Cognitive impairment
|Mentally impaired from damage to the brain. You feel weirdly confused...
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Brain health]] < 95%
|-
![[File:Braindamage Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Neurological damage
|Strong mental deficit. Ability to think intelligently and self-sustain is limited. Serious brain damage present.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Brain health < 80%
|-
![[File:Braindamage Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Severe neurophysiological deterioration
|reality  ..  stops   making   sense
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Brain health < 60%
|-
![[File:Braindamage Moodle 4 Crit.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Comatose</span>
|...
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Brain health < 30%
|-
![[File:Stroke.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Stroke</span>
|Bleeding in the brain, likely caused by severe hypertension. Already in its advanced stages, chances of survival are nil unless you have Braingrow or a procoagulant.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Stroke Amount > 70%
|-
![[File:Cardiacarrest Moodle New.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Cardiac arrest</span>
|Asystole. If you're somehow conscious, this has a low chance of being treated via defibrillation. Otherwise, cerebral hypoxia and death is soon to follow.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Heart stopped
|-
![[File:Arrhythmia 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Arrhythmia
|Abnormal heart rhythm, likely caused by severe strain to the body. May progress further if the cause isn't addressed. Can be defibrillated.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Fibrillation > 15%
|-
![[File:Moodle_arrythmia_2_critical.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Ventricular tachycardia</span>
|Severe irregular heartbeat, preventing effective blood pumping. Will progress into lethal V-fib if not treated. Can be defibrillated.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Fibrillation > 50%
|-
![[File:Arrhythmia 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Ventricular fibrillation</span>
|Life threatening, chaotic heart rhythm. Asystole is soon to follow. Things have gone horribly wrong.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Fibrillation > 75%
|-
![[File:Moodle_hypotension_0.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Mild hypotension
|Slightly decreased blood pressure. You feel slightly dizzy.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Blood pressure < 110/73 and not in cardiac arrest
|-
![[File:Moodle_hypotension_1.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Hypotension
|Moderately decreased blood pressure. You look pale and have clammy skin. Something is wrong - check your vitals.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Blood pressure < 96/63 and not in cardiac arrest
|-
![[File:Moodle_hypotension_2_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Severe hypotension</span>
|Severely decreased blood pressure, you're on the edge of fainting. Treatment needed. This might start fibrillation, check your vitals.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Blood pressure < 83/55 and not in cardiac arrest
Critical when Blood pressure < 70/46
|-
![[File:Moodle_hypotension_3_critical.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Circulatory collapse</span>
|Lethally low blood pressure. Blood is not getting to your organs. Cerebral hypoxia and death is imminent.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Blood pressure < 60/40 and not in cardiac arrest
|-
![[File:Moodle_hypertension_0.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Mild hypertension
|Slightly elevated blood pressure.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Blood pressure > 130/86 and not in cardiac arrest
|-
![[File:Moodle_hypertension_1.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Hypertension
|Moderately elevated blood pressure. You have a headache, you're dizzy and your nose is bleeding. Check your vitals.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Blood pressure > 145/96 and not in cardiac arrest
|-
![[File:Moodle_hypertension_2.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Severe hypertension
|Severely elevated blood pressure, dangerously close to having severe health complications. You feel terrible. Check your vitals.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Blood pressure > 162/107 and not in cardiac arrest
|-
![[File:Moodle_hypertension_3_critical.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Hypertensive crisis</span>
|Life-threatening blood pressure. Risk of hemorrhagic stroke. Check your vitals urgently, and watch for stroke symptoms.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Blood pressure > 180/119 and not in cardiac arrest
|-
![[File:hypoventilation 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Mild hypoventilation
|Lowered respiratory rate.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Respiratory rate < 22.5/min
|-
![[File:hypoventilation 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Hypoventilation
|Highly lowered respiratory rate, enough to slowly lower blood oxygen concentration.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Respiratory rate < 12.5/min
|-
![[File:Respfailure.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Respiratory arrest</span>
|Suffocating! Loss of consciousness and death imminent if untreated.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Respiratory rate < 2.5/min
|-
![[File:Thoraxdestroyed Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Lung failure</span>
|Your lungs are too damaged to function, caused by critically low thorax muscle health.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Limb health|Thorax health]] < 4%
|-
![[File:Moodle_hemothorax_1_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Hemothorax</span>
|Blood is accumulating in the pleural cavity due to internal bleeding. Your chest hurts... Treatment needed.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Hemothorax]] > 40%
Hemothorax > 70%
|-
![[File:Moodle_pulmonaryembolism_3_critical.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Pulmonary embolism</span>
|A large blood clot has broken off and lodged itself in the lungs, blocking an artery. Rapid lung damage and suffocation incoming. Lower your blood viscosity urgently.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Has a pulmonary embolism
(1.66% chance every second when >90% blood viscosity)
|-
![[File:Oxygen Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Mild hypoxemia
|SpO2 below 90%. While not dangerous, it could be a sign of an underlying condition.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Oxygen|Sp02]] < 90%
|-
![[File:Oxygen Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Hypoxemia
|SpO2 below 75%, causing tachycardia and slowly depriving the brain of oxygen. While not lethal, it does point at an underlying condition.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Sp02 < 75%
|-
![[File:Oxygen Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Severe hypoxemia
|SpO2 below 60%, depriving tissues of oxygen and likely causing heart arrhythmia. Lethal if left to progress.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Sp02 < 60%
|-
![[File:Oxygen Moodle 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Critical hypoxemia
|SpO2 below 45%. Something in your body has gone horribly, horribly wrong. Lethal if left to progress.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Sp02 < 45%
|-
![[File:Irradiated 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Uncomfortable
|Feeling weirdly irritated and uncomfortable.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Absorbed [[radiation]] > 3.0 Gy
|-
![[File:Irradiated Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Radiation sickness
|Feverish and nauseous. Your skin feels hot and painful. Something is very wrong. It's terrifying.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Absorbed radiation > 9.0 Gy
|-
![[File:Irradiated Moodle 3 Crit.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Severe radiation sickness</span>
|Horribly sick and aching all over. Breathing and thinking is extremely difficult. You feel abhorrent.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Absorbed radiation > 15.0 Gy
|-
![[File:Irradiated Moodle 4 Crit.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Chernobyl wannabe</span>
|''Not going gently into that good night...''
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Absorbed radiation > 24.0 Gy
|-
![[File:Pain 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Discomfort
|Feeling mild pain.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Pain|Total pain]] > 10%
|-
![[File:Pain 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Pain
|Hurting a decent bit. Unhappiness rising slowly.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Total pain > 30%
|-
![[File:Pain 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Severe pain
|Half-conscious, mind fogged by intense pain. Unhappiness rising.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Total pain > 55%
|-
![[File:Moodle_pain_3_critical.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Agony</span>
|Mind-shattering pain. Movement compromised. Death sounds preferable right about now. Unhappiness rising quickly.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Total pain > 80%
|-
![[File:Shock.png|48x48px]]<br /> Shock
|Going into shock from agony.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Shock]] > 30%
|-
![[File:Overdose Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Opiated
|Relaxed and calm. Your body feels numb.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Opiates|Opiate]] reception > 5%
|-
![[File:Overdose Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Drugged
|Very relaxed and calm, but your lungs feel heavy. A little more tired than usual. This feels pretty good, for now...
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Opiate reception > 20%
|-
![[File:Overdose Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Highly drugged
|Breathing is difficult, but your mind is in euphoria. This definitely isn't healthy. If only it could last forever...
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Opiate reception > 50%
|-
![[File:Overdose Moodle 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Opioid overdose</span>
|Respiratory failure. You are experiencing a drug-filled euphoria. Asphyxiation imminent.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Opiate reception > 80%
|-
![[File:Withdrawal 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Opioid craving
|You really want another shot.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Opiate reception < -5%
|-
![[File:Withdrawal 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Withdrawal
|Your body is desperate for another hit. You want to vomit... This feels really bad. Treatment recommended.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Opiate reception < -15%
|-
![[File:Withdrawal 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Severe withdrawal
|You are struggling to hold yourself together, shaking, desperate for any sort of relief. It feels horrible. Treatment needed.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Opiate reception < -25%
|-
![[File:Withdrawal 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Dying of withdrawal</span>
|Your body is failing to sustain itself without the opiates it became so reliant on. Your heart is struggling to pump blood around the body; Watch for fibrillation.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Opiate reception < -34%
|-
![[File:Concussion moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Concussed</span>
|Rendered unconscious by low head vitality - you will wake up when your head heals.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Head [[muscle health]] <14.4
|-
![[File:Faint 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Confused
|Feeling disoriented and slightly dizzy.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Consciousness]] < 90%
|-
![[File:Faint 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Very confused
|Confused and dizzy, struggling to keep up with the world around you.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Consciousness < 72%
|-
![[File:Faint 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Fainting
|Barely conscious, feeling like you could collapse at any moment.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Consciousness < 55%
|-
![[File:Faint 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Incapacitated
|Can't stand or think. You barely feel anything.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Consciousness < 30%
|-
![[File:Unconscious Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Unconscious
|Not responding to any external stimuli. Lights out.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Consciousness < 20%, not sleeping or concussed
|-
![[File:Drugoverdose Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Drug overdose</span>
|You have overdosed on a non-opioid drug. Health complications likely.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Injuries#Drug overdose|Drug overdose]]
(taking too much antidepressant, anti-rad, stimulant, or sleeping pills at once)
|-
![[File:Moodle_internalbleed_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Internal bleeding</span>
|Turns out your guts and lungs are NOT where the blood is supposed to be. Treatment recommended.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Internal bleeding]] > 0.04275 L/min

Internal bleeding > 0.2223 L/min

Internal bleeding > 0.43605 L/min

Internal bleeding > 0.6498 L/min

Critical when Internal bleeding > 0.4275 L/min
|-
![[File:Moodle_smallbleeding_0.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Minor bleeding
|Blood is oozing out of a relatively small wound. There is no immediate danger.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Total [[bleeding]] > 0 L/m
|-
![[File:Moodle_bleeding_1.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Bleeding
|Blood is flowing out of a decently sized wound. Unlikely to be fatal if you're healthy. Treatment recommended.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Total bleeding > 0.09 L/m
|-
![[File:Moodle_heavybleeding_2_critical.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Heavy bleeding</span>
|A large volume of blood is haemorrhaging out of your body. Likely lethal if untreated. Treatment needed.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Total bleeding > 0.225 L/m
|-
![[File:Moodle_maxbleeding_3_critical.webp|64x64px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Catastrophic bleeding</span>
|''As your life gushes out behind you, you remember that you are mortal.''
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Total bleeding > 0.45 L/m
|-
![[File:Endurance 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Slightly exerted
|Mildly physically strained. (&lt;Stamina&gt;%)
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Stamina]] < 70%
|-
![[File:Endurance 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Exerted
|Uncomfortably exerted, struggling to move and work. (<Stamina>%)
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Stamina < 50%
|-
![[File:Endurance 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Highly exerted
|Barely able to move, highly physically exerted. (<Stamina>%)
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Stamina < 35%
|-
![[File:Endurance 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Totally exhausted</span>
|Barely able to breathe. (<Stamina>%)
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Stamina < 15%
|-
![[File:Moodle_brokenbone_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Fractured bone
|You broke something. Try not to use the affected limb, and rest as much as possible. Treatment highly recommended.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Any bone [[Fracture|fractured]]

Highest fracture heal time > 6m 28s

Highest fracture heal time > 19m 23s

Highest fracture heal time > 32m 18s
|-
![[File:Moodle_dislocation_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Dislocated joint
|You dislocated something. Try not to use the affected limb, and find a way to fix it. Treatment recommended.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Any joint [[Dislocation|dislocated]]

Highest dislocation heal time > 3m 58s

Highest dislocation heal time > 11m 54s

Highest dislocation heal time > 19m 50s
|-
![[File:Moodle_brokenneck_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Fractured neck
|Your neck is broken. Your spinal cord isn't severed, but any amount of moving around will be agonizing. Physically weaker from the neck down. Eating is painful.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Neck (head) fractured

Fractured neck heal time > 6m 28s

Fractured neck heal time > 19m 23s

Fractured neck heal time > 32m 18s
|-
![[File:Moodle_brokenribs_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Fractured ribs
|Your ribs are broken, making breathing painful and much harder. Hope none of them punctured your lungs. Weakened arm strength.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Ribs (thorax) fractured

Fractured ribs heal time > 6m 28s

Fractured ribs heal time > 19m 23s

Fractured ribs heal time > 32m 18s
|-
![[File:Moodle_dislocatedjaw_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Dislocated jaw
|Your jaw is dislocated, impairing your speech and making eating anything extremely painful.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Jaw (head) dislocated

Dislocated jaw heal time > 3m 58s

Dislocated jaw heal time > 11m 54s

Dislocated jaw heal time > 19m 50s
|-
![[File:Moodle_dislocatedspine_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Dislocated spine
|Your spine is dislocated. Your spinal cord isn't severed, but moving your body at all is really painful. Physically weaker from the waist down.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Spine (thorax) dislocated

Dislocated spine heal time > 3m 58s

Dislocated spine heal time > 11m 54s

Dislocated spine heal time > 19m 50s
|-
![[File:Infection 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Infection
|The infection site is swollen and warm. Treatment needed. Find something that can kill off foreign bodies.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Any limb is visibly [[Infection|infected]]
|-
![[File:Infection 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Painful infection
|The infection site is leaking dark pus, and is swelling more. Treatment needed.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Highest infection > 40%
|-
![[File:Infection 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Severe infection
|The infection is spreading across the limb quickly and painfully. Chances of going into sepsis. Urgent treatment needed.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Highest infection > 60%
|-
![[File:Infection 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Life-threatening infection
|The infection is spreading to other limbs, and the infected limb is starting to undergo necrosis. Sepsis is setting in. Emergency care needed.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Highest infection > 80%
|-
![[File:Sepsis 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Sepsis
|A widespread infection is causing your body to react badly. You feel confused, with lowered blood pressure and a fever. Lethal if progresses.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Sepsis|Septic shock]] > 10%
|-
![[File:Sepsis 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Severe sepsis
|Increased heart rate, lowered blood pressure, lightheadedness and a strong fever. Signs of organ dysfunction. Likely to soon enter septic shock.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Septic shock > 50%
|-
![[File:Sepsis 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Septic shock</span>
|''You couldn't stop for death, so death has kindly stopped by for you.'' Circulatory collapse imminent.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Septic shock > 80%
|-
![[File:Toxicosis 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Mild toxicosis
|Slight hemotoxin presence in the bloodstream. Did something bite you?
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Current [[venom]] > 2%
|-
![[File:Toxicosis 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Toxicosis
|Hemotoxin present in the bloodstream, impairing blood clotting and destroying blood cells. Watch for vital signs
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Current venom > 25%
|-
![[File:Toxicosis 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Severe toxicosis
|Large amount of hemotoxin present in the bloodstream, clogging your blood and destroying blood cells. Watch for vital signs.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Current venom > 55%
|-
![[File:Toxicosis 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Toxic crisis</span>
|Your blood more closely resembles marmalade than something that can upkeep life.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Current venom > 80%
|-
![[File:Sleep 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Drowsy
|Getting sleepy.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Energy]] < 35%
|-
![[File:Sleep 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Tired
|It's nap time.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Energy < 25%
|-
![[File:Sleep 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Very tired
|It's REALLY nap time.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Energy < 15%
|-
![[File:Sleep 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Half-asleep</span>
|Barely awake, about to collapse from exhaustion.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Energy < 7%
|-
![[File:Moodle_hunger_0.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Peckish
|Could do with a bite to eat.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Hunger]] < 75
Requirement lowered when unhappy, down to 7.5 at -100 mood.
|-
![[File:Moodle_hunger_1.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Hungry
|Uncomfortably hungry. Slightly weaker than usual.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Hunger < 50
Requirement lowered when unhappy, down to 5 at -100 mood.
|-
![[File:Moodle_hunger_2.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Very hungry
|Extremely hungry, desperate for satiation. Weaker than usual.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Hunger < 35
Requirement lowered when unhappy, down to 3.5 at -100 mood.
|-
![[File:Moodle_hunger_3_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Starving</span>
|Your entire body, just wasting away... Total organ failure imminent.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Hunger <= 15

Requirement lowered when unhappy, down to 1.5 at -100 mood.

Critical when Hunger <= 0
|-
![[File:Moodle_thirst_0.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Thirsty
|Feeling a little thirsty.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Thirst]] < 75
|-
![[File:Moodle_thirst_1.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Dehydrated
|Low body water volume. Very thirsty.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Thirst < 55
|-
![[File:Moodle_thirst_2.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Parched
|Body drying out, in desperate need of water. Mind consumed by thirst.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Thirst < 35
|-
![[File:Moodle_thirst_3_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Desiccated</span>
|Blood volume dangerously low and thick due to lack of fluids.<br />''Your dust is becoming one with the earth...''
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Thirst <= 20
Critical when Thirst <= 0
|-
! [[file:slaked.png|48x48px]]<br /> Slaked
|Your thirst is fully satiated - you won't need water for a while. Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure increased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Thirst > 100
|-
! [[file:overhydrated.png|48x48px]]<br /> Overhydrated
|You've drank considerably more than needed. Movement slightly impaired. Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure increased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Thirst > 125
|-
! [[file:waterintoxicated.png|48x48px]]<br /><span style="color:#FF0000;">Water-intoxicated</span>
|Excessive water intake. Your cells are swelling, causing high intracranial pressure, interrupting blood flow to the brain. Your head hurts... Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure highly increased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Thirst > 175
|-
![[File:Nausea 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Queasy
|Feeling discomfort. Minorly sick.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Sickness]] > 10%
|-
![[File:Nausea 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Nauseous
|Confused, uncomfortable around the stomach. Prone to vomiting.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Sickness > 30%
|-
![[File:Nausea 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Sick
|Lethargic, tired and in major discomfort. Very prone to vomiting.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Sickness > 50%
|-
![[File:Moodle_sick_3_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Grossly sick</span>
|Dangerously sick. Something is VERY wrong on the inside. Weak, confused and in a world of pain.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Sickness > 75%
Critical when Sickness > 95%
|-
![[File:Heat 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Warm
|A little warm for comfort.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Temperature|Body temperature]] > 38°C
|-
![[File:Heat 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Hot
|Unpleasantly hot. Thirst increased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Body temperature > 39°C
|-
![[File:Heat 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Hyperthermia
|Dangerously hot. You're struggling to go on in the heat... Thirst highly increased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Body temperature > 40.25°C
|-
![[File:Heat 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Heatstroke</span>
|Cells are starting to die from the intense heat. Irreversible organ damage imminent.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Body temperature > 41.5°C
|-
![[File:Cold 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Chilly
|A little cold for comfort.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Body temperature < 35.5°C
|-
![[File:Cold 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Cold
|Unpleasantly cold. Your body is slowing down.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Body temperature < 34°C
|-
![[File:Cold 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Hypothermia
|Dangerously low temperature, body and mind taken by the cold. Your entire body is slowly shutting down.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Body temperature < 32.5°C
|-
![[File:Cold 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Freezing to death</span>
|You feel like you're burning up, but you're so tired and confused. You could go for a long nap...
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Body temperature < 28°C
|-
![[File:Moodle_sad_0.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Feeling down
|Starting to realize the gravity of your situation. Try to distract yourself.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Mood]] < -10
|-
![[File:Moodle_gloomy_1.webp|48x48px]]<br /> Gloomy
|Lacking the motivation to go on, struggling with emotions. Things really aren't looking up. Find a way to distract yourself.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Mood < -30
|-
![[File:Moodle_depression_2_anim.webp|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Depressed</span>
|Barely willing to do anything. Your mind, ravaged by desperation. Maybe it will all be over soon?
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Mood < -50
Critical when about to self-harm
|-
![[File:Moodle_miserable_3_anim.webp|68x68px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Miserable</span>
|''How does it feel, knowing you're not coming back up..?''
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Mood < -75
Critical when about to self-harm
|-
![[File:Dulled Claws Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Dulled claws
|Your claws are worn down from continuous use, reducing your damage output. Give your hands a break, or use a tool.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Claw health < 60%
|-
![[File:Broken Claws Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Broken claws
|Your claws are severely damaged from excessive use, severely reducing your damage output. You might damage your hands if you keep using them without a tool.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Claw health < 25%
|-
![[File:Deaf 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Impaired hearing
|You can't hear those high frequencies as well as before. Let your ears rest for a while.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Hearing loss]] > 15%
|-
![[File:Deaf 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Hearing loss
|Everything sounds very muffled and echo-y. You feel irritated. This may take a bit.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Hearing loss > 40%
|-
![[File:Deaf 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Severe hearing loss
|You can barely hear anything. You feel very irritated. Your ears will take a good while to improve.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Hearing loss > 70%
|-
![[File:Dirty Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Dirty
|Consider taking a quick bath. (&lt;Dirtiness&gt;%)
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Dirtiness]] > 50%
|-
![[File:Dirty Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Very dirty
|While you don't particularly mind the lack of hygiene, your immune system certainly will. Take a bath. (&lt;Dirtiness&gt;%)
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Dirtiness > 80%
|-
![[File:Encumbered Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Heavy load
|Carrying a bit much for comfort. &lt;Over-encumbrance&gt;% encumbrance.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Encumbrance#Overencumbrance|Over-encumbrance]] > 0%
|-
![[File:Encumbered Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Encumbered
|Carrying too much. Stamina and mobility decreased. Passively gain STR/RES. &lt;Over-encumbrance&gt;% encumbrance.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Over-encumbrance > 30%
|-
![[File:Encumbered Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Very encumbered
|Carrying way too much. Stamina and mobility highly decreased. Passively gain STR/RES. &lt;Over-encumbrance&gt;% encumbrance.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Over-encumbrance > 55%
|-
![[File:Encumbered Moodle 4 Crit.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Hampered</span>
|Practically unable to move. Carrying WAY, way too much. Passively gain STR/RES. &lt;Over-encumbrance&gt;% encumbrance.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Over-encumbrance > 85%
|-
![[File:Wet Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Damp
|Your fur feels slightly wet.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Wetness]] > 5%
|-
![[File:Wet Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Wet
|Considerably wet. Temperature and comfort decreased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Wetness > 20%
|-
![[File:Wet Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Soaked
|Dripping wet. Temperature and comfort considerably decreased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Wetness > 45%
|-
![[File:Wet Moodle 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Water-logged
|Completely drenched! The water is weighing you down. Temperature and comfort highly decreased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Wetness > 70%
|-
! colspan="4" style="text-align: center" | The following are <abbr title="Only appear in the health panel or while the moodle bar is hovered over">side moodles</abbr>
|-
![[File:Lowimmunity Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Immunocompromised
|Your immune system is severely weakened, be it due to dirtyness, hunger, thirst or more. Infections are much more dangerous. Take better care of yourself.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Immunity]] < 55%
|-
![[File:Underweight Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Underweight
|Try to pack on a few kilos.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Weight]] < 44.9kg
|-
![[File:Underweight Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Skinny
|Unhealthily underweight considering your species. Weaker than normal. Lowered carrying capacity.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Weight < 39.8kg
|-
![[File:Underweight Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Malnourished
|You're dangerously thin and frail. Way weaker than normal, prone to being tired and lethargic. Lowered carrying capacity.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Weight < 36.4kg
|-
![[File:Underweight Moodle 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Emaciated
|You're excessively skinny. You can easily see and feel your bones through your fur. At high risk of heart failure. Very lowered carrying capacity.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Weight < 33kg
|-
![[File:Overweight Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Chubby
|Try to lose a few kilos.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Weight > 55kg
|-
![[File:Overweight Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Overweight
|Unhealthily overweight, though you look about average compared to other species. Clumsier, you get tired quicker.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Weight > 60.2kg
|-
![[File:Overweight Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Fat
|Dangerously wide and soft. Way clumsier and more prone to exhaustion.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Weight > 63.6kg
|-
![[File:Overweight Moodle 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Obese
|Life-threatenigly obese. It's like you stuffed a bag of fur with pure fat and hunger. At high risk of heart failure.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Weight > 67kg
|-
![[File:Trauma Moodle 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Scared
|Recent events have left you uneasy and scarred. You feel shaky. You REALLY don't want to go through that again. Happiness reduced.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Trauma]] > 25%
|-
![[File:Trauma Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Traumatized
|You feel panicked and horrified. Visions of past horrors flash before your eyes. You want OUT of here by any means necessary... This wound will take a good while to heal. Happiness highly reduced.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Trauma > 45%
|-
![[File:Trauma Moodle 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Shell shocked
|Horrified. Helpless. Hopeless. You can't muster a single word. Happiness severely reduced.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Trauma > 80%
|-
![[File:Badsleep Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Bad sleep
|Your back really isn't appreciating your choice of where you slept. Try picking a less harsh surface next time. Consciousness decreased.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Waking up from '''Mediocre''' (1m) or '''Bad''' (2m 30s) [[sleep]] quality
|-
![[File:Speechless.png|48x48px]]<br /> Impaired speech
|Something is making speaking difficult... You might have trouble communicating with others.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Conscious while item in mouth, dislocated jaw, or disfigured <!-- The file name is wrong... lol -->
|-
![[File:Rnrs Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Rapid neuron regeneration sickness
|Neural shock caused by a sudden and rapid regeneration of brain tissue. While you'll adjust after some time, you might not want to take another dose for now. (&lt;Time remaining&gt;)
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Nomark.png|32x32px]]
|Consumed [[braingrow]] (1 min/ml) or [[Neural Booster]] (20 min)
|-
![[File:Rippedjaw Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Disfigured
|Your lower jaw has been ripped off due severe trauma to the head. Eating and talking is much harder. You are horribly scarred by the experience.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Jaw missing
|-
![[File:Amputation Moodle.png|48x48px]]<br /> Amputated
|One of your extremities has been dismembered. Traumatizing. Obviously, any use of the lobbed off limb is permanently gone.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Any limb missing
|-
![[File:Rippedeye Moodle 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Half-blind
|One of your eyes has been ripped out, halving your field of view. You are somewhat scarred by the experience. Don't lose the remaining one.
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|One eye missing
|-
![[File:Rippedeye Moodle 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> Blind
|Both of your eyes have been ripped out. You can only get by using feel and sound. At least you no longer need a light source...
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|Both eyes missing
|-
!{{Anchor|Hollow}}[[File:Hollow.png|48x48px]]<br /> [[Mindwipe#Hollow|Hollow]]
|
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Checkmark.png|32x32px]]
|[[Mindwipe]] used, or [[Braingrow]]/[[Neural Booster]] with RNRS
|}

== Unused ==
These moodles are present in the lang file, but are not referenced in code and do not appear in-game.
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible"
|+
! scope="col" style="width: 10%" | Moodle 
! scope="col" style="width: 50%" | Description
! scope="col" | Cause
|-
![[File:Deceased.png|48x48px]]<br /> Deceased
|Permanent, irreversible, and complete loss of brain function. You have left this world behind, alike the rest.
|Dead, brain health is at 0
|-
![[File:Trauma Moodle 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Anxious
|Something bad has happened to you, and your brain does NOT want to experience it again. Happiness slightly reduced.
|Unknown, likely would appear around ~10-15% [[Trauma]]
|-
![[File:Hypervolemic 1.png|48x48px]]<br /> Bloated
|Feeling uncomfortable. Increased blood pressure.
|Blood volume > 5 L
|-
![[File:Hypervolemic 2.png|48x48px]]<br /> Hypervolemic
|Body bloated, blood pressure high, feeling dizzy with a headache.
|Blood volume > 5.25 L
|-
![[File:Hypervolemic 3.png|48x48px]]<br /> Critically hypervolemic
|Grossly bloated. Extremely high blood pressure. Can barely stand, or think.
|Blood volume > 5.5 L
|-
![[File:Hypervolemic 4.png|48x48px]]<br /> <span style="color:#FF0000;">Lethally hypervolemic</span>
|There's a terrible pain in your chest... Vital signs fading. Blood volume and pressure way too high.
|Blood volume ≥ 5.625 L
|}
[[Category:Mechanics]]
